modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Print jobs missing after name change on university computer.

full_description_text: 
So, the user changed their name and now they can't see their print jobs in USD Print. It shows their cost center, but no jobs are there. They are using a university owned computer with Windows and Papercut. This is causing some frustration since they need to print stuff.
short_description: Print jobs missing after name change on university computer.
description: So, the user changed their name and now they can't see their print jobs in USD Print. It shows their cost center, but no jobs are there. They are using a university owned computer with Windows and Papercut. This is causing some frustration since they need to print stuff.
